recommendations.text: Make the safe_outputs job tolerant of per-item failures: when the agent succeeded and ≥1 item landed, exit non-red with a partial-success summary instead of failing the whole job on a single rejected item. Two recurrence-heavy variants: (a) add_comment target='*' without item_number — validate/auto-skip or surface as a warning; (b) reject before run so the agent can self-correct.

For add_comment with target='*', require/inject the item_number at emit-time or give the agent a clearer schema hint. Contribution Check + PR Sous Chef both emit target='*' add_comment with no item_number repeatedly.

Add a soft pre-cap guard for heavy daily-aggregation workflows (e.g. Daily Ambient Context Optimizer): chunk/stream the context or set a 22-23M effective-token budget ceiling that triggers graceful summarization before hitting the hard 25M 429. #35661.

Investigate copilot-sdk-driver tool-permission lockout: when the headless session has no tool permissions, fail fast with a clear error instead of looping until the 600s session.idle timeout. Add a startup self-check that aborts within seconds if all tools return permission-denied.
For PR Sous Chef, skip update_branch when the PR modifies .github/workflows/** (App lacks workflows scope) instead of attempting and warning.
Add label + temporary_id support to the create_discussion safe-output surface (requested by Smoke Copilot probe).
